description:
No spec subject — flake investigation.

Third occurrence of the signature, now AT CAP per the specled_-csg orchestration policy (comments on specled_-csg: FLAKE ACCEPTED #1 after .1, #2 after .3; policy said 3rd occurrence requires an investigation ticket).

Occurrences:
1. 2026-07-17 specled_-csg.1 merge gate (local) — standalone re-run green
2. 2026-07-17 specled_-csg.3 merge gate (local) — standalone re-run green
3. 2026-07-22 GitHub Actions run 29944042016 on feat/specled_-csg-evidence-ledger-split (bc6837b) — failing test tracer_test.exs:241 under the merged tagged_tests invocation (70+ files)

Signature: only fires in the big merged tagged_tests run, never standalone or in plain 'mix test'. Never intersects the diffs it fails on. Likely suspects: compiler-tracer manifest state shared across the merged run, test-order dependence, or CI-runner timing. Related: specled_-f98 (flaky one-off failures in full-suite runs, 2026-07-02).

comments.text: Recurring observation (epic specled_-155 pipeline, 2026-07-23): the command-runner temp-script race now seen 3x — (1) merge gate 1 mix test stray 'specled_cmd_*.sh: No such file or directory'; (2) T3 verify mix test --stale same; (3) T7 verify spec.check run1 exit 127 'exs: command not found' on UNTOUCHED evidence_store target.sh, passing manually and on runs 2-3. Class: tempfile_command_execution race. All runs otherwise green; no flake-accepts consumed.

title: Investigate flaky specled.compiler_tracer verification_command_failed (tracer_test.exs:241) under multi-file tagged_tests run
